text:
Bira (ビラ, Bira) is a type of tree that is found within the NGL. Its substance is a main ingredient to the narcotic D². Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 192 

Overview

Bira's main use is to produce a narcotic drug known as D². Gyro's drug cartel uses the Bira from plantation fields on the NGL in their narcotics factory. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

Kite, with Gon and Killua, locates a narcotics factory that produces D². Kite mentions that Bira is the main ingredient for the substance. 

Trivia

The name of the tree is transliterated as bila tree in Crunchyroll's version/translation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 82 (2011) 

Anime and Manga Differences

In the 2011 anime adaptation, it is further detailed that Bira is native to the Mitene Union and that it is claimed that over 80% of the world's Bira trees are located in the NGL. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 78 (2011)
